news.t: Manulife John Hancock Investments launches Global Senior Loan ETF for potential income and global credit exposure

overview.description: The John Hancock Global Senior Loan ETF (JHLN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund investing in a diversified global portfolio of senior loans. JHLN was launched on Aug 20, 2025 and is issued by John Hancock.

data.title: Manulife John Hancock Investments launches Global Senior Loan ETF for potential income and global credit exposure
data.text: BOSTON , Aug. 20, 2025 /PRNewswire/ - Manulife John Hancock Investments today will launch John Hancock Global Senior Loan ETF (NYSE Arca: JHLN), subadvised by affiliated investment manager Manulife | ...
